_comment: Per-language peak RSS baseline consumed by .github/workflows/memory-regression.yml via scripts/benchmark.py. Each entry is the peak_memory_mb value reported by a single-language benchmark run on the bundled test/models/multilingual-test-medium.onnx model. peak_memory_mb: null is a placeholder; the first CI run uploads the observed values as a workflow artifact and a follow-up PR commits them here. threshold_pct is the +regression tolerance vs baseline; current policy is warn-only (workflow does not fail).
